welcome_offer.description: No standard welcome offer; occasional promotions for Apple product purchases or referrals

earning_rates.notes: Apple.com, Apple Store, App Store, Apple services, and select partners via Apple Pay
Physical card or manual card number entry

other_benefits.name: Daily Cash
other_benefits.description: Cash back daily; can be sent to Apple Cash or deposited to Apple Savings

other_benefits.name: No Fees
other_benefits.description: No annual fee, no late fee, no foreign transaction fee, no over-limit fee

other_benefits.name: Apple Wallet Integration
other_benefits.description: Manage card entirely in iPhone Wallet app

application_rules.notes: Not a traditional credit card; managed through Apple Wallet. Physical titanium card has no numbers.
